muclient.script:
require "reload_all"
function reload() Note("Reloading all installed plugins, please wait...") DoAfterSpecial (1, "reload_all_plugins()", sendto.script) end
function benchmark_say() local count = 200 Note("Benchmark: timing " .. count .. " nvda.say() calls...")
-- Phase 1: raw nvda.say() calls only local t1 = utils.timer() for i = 1, count do Execute("tts_note Line number " .. i .. " of benchmark output for testing speech throughput") end local t2 = utils.timer() local say_time = t2 - t1
Note(string.format("Phase 1 - %d tts_note calls: %.4f seconds (%.4f ms each)", count, say_time, say_time / count * 1000))
-- Phase 2: ColourNote calls (triggers Screendraw -> OnPluginScreendraw -> say) local t3 = utils.timer() for i = 1, count do ColourNote("white", "black", "Benchmark line " .. i .. " of " .. count .. " for testing display and speech throughput") end local t4 = utils.timer() local note_time = t4 - t3
Note(string.format("Phase 2 - %d ColourNote calls: %.4f seconds (%.4f ms each)", count, note_time, note_time / count * 1000))
-- Phase 3: ColourNote with speech disabled Execute("tts_disable_silent") local t5 = utils.timer() for i = 1, count do ColourNote("white", "black", "Silent benchmark line " .. i .. " of " .. count) end local t6 = utils.timer() local silent_time = t6 - t5 Execute("tts_enable_silent")
Note(string.format("Phase 3 - %d ColourNote (speech off): %.4f seconds (%.4f ms each)", count, silent_time, silent_time / count * 1000))
Note(string.format("Speech overhead per ColourNote: %.4f ms", (note_time - silent_time) / count * 1000)) Note("Benchmark complete.") end
